• 2D mining game with multiplayer support using MQTT for real-time communication
  • Procedural world generation with 1000x2000 tile map featuring multiple ore tiers
  • Upgrade system including drill tiers, hull capacity, fuel capacity, and special abilities
  • Inventory management with building mechanics and consumable items
  • Service station for selling ores, refueling, repairing, and purchasing upgrades
  • Teleporter network for fast travel between discovered locations
  • Mobile controls with touch-optimized D-pad and action buttons
  • Admin system with player management, map synchronization, and world control
  • Save system with cloud synchronization and local storage support
  • Dynamic lighting system with day/night cycle and celestial bodies
    const TILE_PROPS = {
      [TILE_TYPES.COAL]: { name: "Coal", color: '#2c3e50', hardness: 2, value: 10, tier: 0 },
      [TILE_TYPES.IRON]: { name: "Iron", color: '#95a5a6', hardness: 2, value: 50, tier: 1 },
      [TILE_TYPES.GOLD]: { name: "Gold", color: '#f1c40f', hardness: 1, value: 150, tier: 2 },
      [TILE_TYPES.DIAMOND]: { name: "Diamond", color: '#3498db', hardness: 3, value: 500, tier: 3 }
    };

Mega Miner NG is a browser-based 2D mining game featuring multiplayer gameplay, procedural world generation, and extensive upgrade systems. Players can mine various ores, build structures, trade with others, and explore a vast underground world while managing resources like fuel and hull integrity. The game includes both singleplayer and online multiplayer modes with admin controls, cloud save functionality, and mobile-optimized controls.
